name: Prerequisite Tree
description: Map obstacles and intermediate objectives needed to reach a goal
systemPromptHint: Each intermediate objective should directly overcome a specific obstacle. Obstacles are not just 'hard things' — they are specific barriers that prevent moving from the current state to the next objective. The sequence matters: objectives should be achievable in order from bottom to top.

nodeTags.name: Obstacle
nodeTags.description: A barrier or constraint that blocks progress

nodeTags.name: Intermediate Objective
nodeTags.description: A milestone that overcomes obstacles and unlocks the next step

nodeTags.name: Goal
nodeTags.description: The outcome the tree is intended to achieve

derivedIndicators.name: Starting Point
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — a place you can begin acting immediately

derivedIndicators.name: Milestone
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges — an intermediate step on the path

derivedIndicators.name: Target Outcome
derivedIndicators.description: No outgoing edges — an endpoint or destination in the tree
